parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the instance to be worked on
is the IPI Instance to be worked on

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if initialization was successful XST_FAILURE in case of failure

briefdescription.para: This function triggers an IPI to a destination CPU.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XMailbox instance.
if set trigger the notification in blocking mode

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS in case of success XST_FAILURE in case of failure
This API will be deprecated in 2026.2 and will be made obsolete in 2027.1 release. The functionality of this API can be reproduced with XIpiPs_SendById.

briefdescription.para: This function triggers an IPI to a destination CPU.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XMailbox instance.
Mask of the CPU to which IPI is to be triggered
if set trigger the notification in blocking mode

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS in case of success XST_FAILURE in case of failure

memberdef.argsstring: (XMailbox *InstancePtr, void *MsgBufferPtr, u32 MsgLen, u8 BufferType, u8 Is_Blocking)
memberdef.name: XIpiPs_SendData

briefdescription.para: This function sends an IPI message to a destination CPU.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XMailbox instance
is the pointer to Buffer which contains the message to be sent
is the number of messages (each message is 4bytes)
is the type of buffer
if set trigger the notification in blocking mode

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS in case of success XST_FAILURE in case of failure
This API will be deprecated in 2026.2 and will be made obsolete in 2027.1 release. The functionality of this API can be reproduced with XIpiPs_SendDataById.

memberdef.argsstring: (XMailbox *InstancePtr, void *MsgBufferPtr, u32 MsgLen, u8 BufferType, u32 RemoteId, u8 Is_Blocking)
memberdef.name: XIpiPs_SendDataById

briefdescription.para: This function sends an IPI message to a destination CPU.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XMailbox instance
is the pointer to Buffer which contains the message to be sent
is the number of messages (each message is 4bytes)
is the type of buffer
Mask of the CPU to which IPI is to be triggered
if set trigger the notification in blocking mode

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS in case of success XST_FAILURE in case of failure

briefdescription.para: This function reads an IPI message.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XMailbox instance
is the pointer to Buffer to which the read message needs to be stored
is the number of messages (each message is 4bytes)
is the type of buffer

simplesect.para: This API will be deprecated in 2026.2 and will be made obsolete in 2027.1 release. The functionality of this API can be reproduced with XIpiPs_RecvDataById.

memberdef.argsstring: (XMailbox *InstancePtr, void *MsgBufferPtr, u32 MsgLen, u32 SourceId, u8 BufferType)
memberdef.name: XIpiPs_RecvDataById

briefdescription.para: This function reads an IPI message.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XMailbox instance
is the pointer to Buffer to which the read message needs to be stored
is the number of messages (each message is 4bytes)
Device Mask for the CPU which has sent the message
is the type of buffer

briefdescription.para: This function implements the interrupt handler.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XMailbox instance

briefdescription.para: This function implements the interrupt handler for errors.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XMailbox instance
